Elon Musk
Real-life Tony Stark who decided Mars wasn't just
for Rover anymore. Turns rockets into boomerangs and
makes cars that fart on command. Earth's richest
memelord.
Donald Trump
Queens builder turned President who reshaped Manhattan
and turned âhuge" into a five-syllable word.
Builds towers like Minecraft and drains swamps for
breakfast.
JD Vance
an American politician and author serving as the 50th vice president of the United States
Jeffrey Epstein
an American financier and convicted sex offender who ran a large-scale sex trafficking operation involving dozens of underage girls and died by suicide in jail while awaiting federal trial in 2019
Jerome Powell
the 16th Chair of the U.S. Federal Reserve since 2018, who successfully navigated the economy through the COVID-19 crisis with massive stimulus and later led aggressive interest-rate hikes that tamed the worst inflation in four decades while achieving a soft landing.
Erika Kirk
an American businesswoman, former Miss Arizona USA 2012, podcaster, and faith-based entrepreneur who became chairwoman and CEO of Turning Point USA after the September 2025 assassination of her husband, Charlie Kirk, the organizationâs co-founder.
Changpeng Zhao
Hawaii's warrior-philosopher who does combat
drills in a surfsuit. Can debate foreign policy while
holding a perfect headstand. Plot twist Queen.

How To Buy
0 1
Create Wallet
Download Phantom or your wallet of choice from the app store
or Google Play for free. Desktop users, download the Google
Chrome extension by searching for Phantom.
0 2
Get some SOL
Have SOL in your wallet to switch to $FRENS. If you donât have
any SOL, you can buy directly on Phantom, transfer from
another wallet, or buy on another exchange and send it to your
wallet.
0 3
Go to Mars
Go to 
unisawap.org 
and connect your wallet. When prompted, click
"sign" in your wallet. Copy and paste the $FRENS
contract address below, and paste it in the "buying"
section.
Contract Address
HkipgHjpDJNyiaPnrUNVbLfY3oDJcrpcinX3kiHnpump
0 4
Swap for FRENS
Choose how much SOL you want to spend. Now click
"SWAP". You can now check your wallet for your
$FRENS tokens!

Our community
$FRENS is a meme token created for entertainment purposes only
and holds no intrinsic value. Do not invest money you cannot
